meta.description: PIN (PEARL Intelligence Network) â€” central source registry. Tracks every US water data endpoint with status, priority, staleness, and error history.

sources.name: Water Quality Portal (WQP)
sources.notes: Primary discrete sample source. Aggregates USGS, EPA, USDA, tribal, and state lab data. Use statecode=US:{fips} for per-state pulls.

sources.name: USGS NWIS Instantaneous Values
sources.notes: Real-time 15-minute sensor data. parameterCd: 00300=DO, 00010=Temp, 00400=pH, 00095=Conductivity, 00060=Discharge, 00065=Gage height, 63680=Turbidity

sources.name: USGS NWIS Daily Values
sources.notes: Daily aggregated values (min/max/mean). Same sites as IV but with daily statistics.

sources.name: EPA ATTAINS (Assessment & TMDL Tracking)
sources.notes: Already cached in lib/attainsCache.ts (51/51 states). GIS MapServer fallback for large states (PA 216K+). REST API times out for states >50K assessments.

sources.name: EPA SDWIS (Safe Drinking Water Info System)
sources.notes: Drinking water systems, violations, enforcement. Supports Envirofacts REST. Paginated via /ROWS/{start}:{end}.

sources.name: FL DBHYDRO (South Florida Water Management)
sources.notes: No auth required. South Florida only (Everglades, Lake Okeechobee, coastal). POST requests with station/date parameters.

sources.name: CA CEDEN (California Environmental Data Exchange)
sources.notes: Open Data Portal is public (CKAN API). Direct CEDEN API (Advanced Query Tool) requires credentials from waterdata@waterboards.ca.gov. Using Open Data Portal for now.

sources.name: Chesapeake Bay Program DataHub
sources.notes: Chesapeake Bay watershed: MD, VA, PA, DE, WV, DC, NY. Endpoints: WaterQuality, LivingResources, Fluorescence, PointSource, Toxics.

sources.name: TX TCEQ (Texas Commission on Environmental Quality)
sources.notes: SWQMIS web interface. Direct API endpoints not yet mapped. Currently using WQP for TX data.

sources.name: NOAA NDBC (National Data Buoy Center)
sources.notes: Buoy data: water temp, wave height, wind. Real-time files at /data/realtime2/{station}.txt. ERDDAP mirror available.

sources.name: NOAA NERRS (National Estuarine Research Reserves)
sources.notes: SWMP (System-Wide Monitoring Program). Real-time water quality at estuarine reserves. Also available via CDMO: https://cdmo.baruch.sc.edu/

sources.name: EPA ICIS-NPDES (Discharge Permits, Violations, Inspections)
sources.notes: Every NPDES discharge permit, violation, and inspection in the US. Tables: ICIS_PERMITS, ICIS_VIOLATIONS, ICIS_INSPECTIONS, ICIS_ENFORCEMENT_ACTIONS. Envirofacts REST, no auth. Always filter by STATE_CODE.

sources.name: EPA ICIS DMR (Discharge Monitoring Reports)
sources.notes: Actual discharge monitoring data â€” BOD, TSS, ammonia, phosphorus, E. coli, flow. VERY large â€” always filter by STATE_CODE. Envirofacts REST, no auth.

sources.name: EPA ECHO (CWA Facility Compliance)
sources.notes: CWA facility compliance data from ECHO. No auth. Query params: p_st for state, responseset for limit.

sources.name: EPA ECHO (CWA Facilities in Violation)
sources.notes: Facilities currently in violation under CWA. p_qiv=Y filters to violators only. No auth.

sources.name: EPA FRS (WWTP Locations & Capacities)
sources.notes: Facility Registry Service â€” WWTP locations, capacities, permit numbers. Filtered by PGM_SYS_ACRNM=NPDES. Envirofacts REST, no auth.

sources.name: EPA UCMR (PFAS Screening Data)
sources.notes: PFAS screening results from Unregulated Contaminant Monitoring Rule (UCMR4). Nationwide â€” no state filter needed for initial pull. Envirofacts REST, no auth.

sources.name: CDC NWSS (Wastewater Surveillance)
sources.notes: Pathogen concentrations (COVID, RSV, influenza) from wastewater treatment plants. Socrata API, no auth. $order by date_end DESC.

sources.name: National Park Service Water Quality (via WQP)
sources.notes: National Park Service WQ data via Water Quality Portal. Organization=NPSTORET. No auth.

sources.name: Data.gov Water Quality Catalog (CKAN)
sources.notes: Meta-catalog discovery â€” returns dataset metadata, not raw data. Useful for finding new sources. CKAN API, no auth.

sources.name: NASA CMR (Satellite Dataset Catalog)
sources.notes: Satellite dataset discovery â€” returns collection metadata. Useful for remote-sensing water quality sources. CMR API, no auth.

sources.name: NY Open Data (Water Quality)
sources.notes: New York Open Data portal. Socrata API, no auth.

sources.name: NJ Open Data (Water Quality)
sources.notes: New Jersey Open Data portal. Socrata API, no auth.

sources.name: PA Open Data (Water Quality)
sources.notes: Pennsylvania Open Data portal. Socrata API, no auth.

sources.name: VA Open Data (Water Quality)
sources.notes: Virginia Open Data portal. Socrata API, no auth.

sources.name: Blue Water Baltimore (Water Reporter)
sources.notes: Community-based water quality monitoring in Baltimore Harbor watershed. DO, TN, TP, turbidity, bacteria, temperature. Via Water Reporter API v2.

sources.name: MD DNR Eyes on the Bay (via MARACOOS ERDDAP)
sources.notes: MD DNR continuous tidal water quality monitoring (15-min intervals). Replaced by CBIBS for real-time but ERDDAP still serves historical.

sources.name: Monitor My Watershed (EnviroDIY/Stroud)
sources.notes: Citizen science sensor data from the EnviroDIY/Stroud Research Center network. Real-time DO, temperature, conductivity, turbidity.

sources.name: NASA STREAM (Satellite-derived Water Quality)
sources.notes: Satellite-derived chlorophyll-a, turbidity, and Secchi depth estimates from Landsat/Sentinel.

sources.name: HydroShare (CUAHSI Data Repository)
sources.notes: Hydrologic dataset repository from CUAHSI research network. Searchable by keyword, subject, and location.

sources.name: USGS NWIS Groundwater Levels
sources.notes: USGS groundwater level measurements. Real-time and historical. Same NWIS service as IV/DV but for gwlevels endpoint.

sources.name: MD MDE ArcGIS (Integrated Report / TMDLs)
sources.notes: MD Integrated Report (303d/305b), TMDLs, pollutant layers. State servers intermittently down — ArcGIS Online fallback available.
